prompt_zh: 你在星巴克，想点一杯热美式，不加糖。
prompt_en: You're at Starbucks. Order a hot Americano, no sugar.
culture_tip: In China, the barista might ask '要大杯还是中杯？' (dà bēi háishì zhōng bēi?) — 'Grande or medium?' Chinese Starbucks sizes work differently!

prompt_zh: 出租车司机问你去哪里，告诉他你要去最近的地铁站。
prompt_en: The taxi driver asks where you're going. Tell him you want to go to the nearest metro station.
culture_tip: Many Chinese taxi drivers will try to chat with you! '你是哪国人？' (nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?) — 'What country are you from?' is a very common question.

prompt_zh: 你在餐馆，想问服务员有没有不辣的菜。
prompt_en: You're at a restaurant. Ask the waiter if they have any non-spicy dishes.
culture_tip: '不要辣' (bú yào là) literally means 'don't want spicy.' But in Sichuan, even '微辣' (wēi là / slightly spicy) can be intense for foreigners!

prompt_zh: 你的中国同事问你周末做了什么，告诉他你去爬山了。
prompt_en: Your Chinese colleague asks what you did this weekend. Tell them you went hiking.

prompt_zh: 你在菜市场买水果，问老板西瓜多少钱一斤。
prompt_en: You're at the fruit market. Ask the vendor how much watermelon costs per jin (500g).
culture_tip: China uses 斤 (jīn) not kilograms for produce. 1 斤 = 500 grams. '多少钱一斤？' (duōshao qián yì jīn?) is the magic phrase!

prompt_zh: 你感冒了，去药店买感冒药，告诉店员你的症状。
prompt_en: You have a cold. Go to the pharmacy and describe your symptoms to buy cold medicine.

prompt_zh: 你要迟到了，给同事发微信说你在路上，大概还要20分钟。
prompt_en: You're running late. Send a WeChat message to your colleague saying you're on the way and need about 20 more minutes.
culture_tip: '在路上了' (zài lù shàng le) is the universal Chinese excuse — it literally means 'already on the road.' Everyone uses it, even if they haven't left yet 😄

prompt_zh: 商务晚宴上，你的中国合作伙伴给你倒酒，你想礼貌地拒绝。
prompt_en: At a business dinner, your Chinese partner pours you a drink. You want to politely decline.
culture_tip: Declining a drink in China requires finesse. '不好意思，我明天一早有飞机' (sorry, I have an early flight tomorrow) is a face-saving excuse that works well.

prompt_zh: 你想在淘宝上买东西，问中国朋友怎么用。
prompt_en: You want to buy something on Taobao. Ask your Chinese friend how to use it.

prompt_zh: 打电话给房东，告诉他空调坏了，请他找人来修。
prompt_en: Call your landlord and tell them the AC is broken. Ask them to send someone to fix it.

prompt_zh: 春节到了，给你的中国朋友发一条拜年的微信。
prompt_en: It's Chinese New Year! Send a festive greeting message to your Chinese friend on WeChat.
culture_tip: 春节快乐 (chūn jié kuài lè) works, but 新年快乐，万事如意 adds warmth. For elders, add 身体健康 (shēntǐ jiànkāng — good health).

prompt_zh: 你在网上看到一个很搞笑的视频，想用中文描述给朋友听。
prompt_en: You saw a hilarious video online. Describe it to your friend in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友问你家乡的天气怎么样，跟中国比有什么不同。
prompt_en: Your Chinese friend asks about the weather in your hometown and how it compares to China.

prompt_zh: 你要搬家了，需要叫一辆搬家公司的车。打电话预约。
prompt_en: You're moving. Call a moving company to book a truck.

prompt_zh: 在公司会议上，用中文介绍你负责的项目进展。
prompt_en: In a company meeting, present your project progress in Chinese.
